title: [$250] [Perf] Scope draft/reaction Onyx subscriptions to per-item level in report actions list

labels.name: External
labels.description: Added to denote the issue can be worked on by a contributor

labels.name: Daily
labels.description: KSv2

body:
## Problem `ReportActionsList` and `MoneyRequestReportActionsList` subscribe to the full `COLLECTION.REPORT_ACTIONS_REACTIONS` and `COLLECTION.REPORT_ACTIONS_DRAFTS` collections, then pass slices to each item via props. Any change to any reaction or draft in any report recreates `renderItem` and forces the entire list to re-render all visible items. Profiling shows the VirtualizedList re-renders ~80 report action items per message send, costing ~196ms. ## Proposed fix Move the emoji reactions and draft message subscriptions from the list level into `ReportActionsListItemRenderer`, so each item subscribes only to its own data: - `useOnyx(REPORT_ACTIONS_REACTIONS_${reportActionID})` for reactions - `useOnyx(REPORT_ACTIONS_DRAFTS_${originalReportID})` for drafts
Issue OwnerCurrent Issue Owner: @ShridharGoel

  • Upwork Job URL: https://www.upwork.com/jobs/~022028480072450887700
  • Upwork Job ID: 2028480072450887700
  • Last Price Increase: 2026-03-02

Go to staging.new.expensify.com 2. Log in with Expensify account as the workspace admin 3. Go to workspace settings > Company cards 4. Tap on Assign 5. In the member search field, type the email address of the non-existent user 6. Tap on the email address of the new user 7. Complete the necessary steps to send the invitation to the new user 8. Proceed with and complete the remaining steps of the card assignment process 9. Tap Assign card ## Expected Result: A new user account is created, and the card is assigned to the new user. The user is redirected to the card details page, displaying the card as assigned to the new user. ## Actual Result: The user stays in the same "Let's double check" page. The user is successfully added as a member to the workspace. ## Workaround: Unknown ## Platforms: - [x] Android: App - [x] Android: mWeb Chrome - [x] iOS: App - [x] iOS: mWeb Safari - [x] iOS: mWeb Chrome - [x] Windows: Chrome - [x] MacOS: Chrome / Safari ## Screenshots/Videos https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/128e4679-f9ae-40dc-bb5e-22c94adf7b45 [View all open jobs on GitHub](https://github.com/Expensify/App/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+label%3A%22Help+Wanted%22)
